## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new user-facing functionality
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — internal change, no behaviour change
- [ ] `docs`
- [ ] `chore` / tooling / CI
- [ ] `breaking change` (explain below)

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) in the title
- [ ] Tests added or updated (or not applicable)
- [ ] OpenAPI spec updated if API surface changed (`packages/openapi-spec`)
- [ ] Generated SDK regenerated if spec changed (`pnpm gen:sdk`)
- [ ] CLA signed (external contributors)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or premium-repo logic in the diff
